title: Why we moved from language X to language Y

quote.text: The real danger is not that computers will begin to think like men, but that men will begin to think like computers
quote.author: Sydney Harris

links.title: Why we moved from language X to language Y
links.description: In case you ever thought "Someone should make a N*N contingency table of all engineering blog posts titled *Why we moved from X  to Y*".

links.title: Guetzli: A New Open Source JPEG Encoder
links.description: Introducing Guetzli, a new open source JPEG compressor that produces smaller image file sizes without sacrificing quality.

links.title: It's Time To Start Using CSS Custom Properties
links.description: CSS custom properties are opening new horizons for web development. They look and work like CSS variables, and the way they work is reflected in their name.

links.title: The New Web Typography
links.description: How should we go about making typographic laws, rules and guidelines for the web?

links.title: A Complete Guide to CSS Grid
links.description: Learn everything about the CSS Grid Module in this illustrated guide with practical examples and demos. A Codrops CSS Reference entry by Hui Jing Chen.

links.title: Which Responsive Design Framework Is Best?
links.description: Which framework should we be using, and why? Also, should we be using the whole framework or just parts of it? Find out in this article.

links.title: The rules of responsive web typography
links.description: Discover the principles and systems you need to know to take the mystery out of responsive web typography.
